tool_args.label: Key Performance Metrics - July 2022
tool_args.raw_text: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT & BUS KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS July 2022 | 8

payload.title: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT & BUS KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.description: Key Performance Metrics report prepared for the July 2022 meeting of the New York City Transit & Bus Committee, covering customer satisfaction, ridership, service performance, accessibility, financial results, major projects, safety and security, and special features.

evidence_refs.source_quote: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT & BUS KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
July 2022 | 8
This performance metrics document was prepared in preparation for the July 2022 meeting of the New York City Transit & Bus Committee.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Richard Davey, NYCT President
tool_args.raw_text: NYCT President Rich Davey speaks to bus customers in the Bronx in advance of the newly redesigned bus network going live on June 26, 2022.

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYCT President Rich Davey
Richard Davey President, New York City Transit

warnings: entity.organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organization names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

tool_args.label: New York City Transit (NYCT)
tool_args.raw_text: New York City Transit and MTA Bus operate all subways and buses in New York City. Our 45,000 employees serve 4,500,000 passengers a day.

payload.description: Operates all subways and buses in New York City; 45,000 employees serve 4,500,000 passengers a day.

evidence_refs.source_quote: New York City Transit and MTA Bus operate all subways and buses in New York City. Our 45,000 employees serve 4,500,000 passengers a day.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)
tool_args.raw_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000-square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving 15.3 million people across 5,000-square-mile area.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000-square-mile travel area

tool_args.label: NYPD
tool_args.raw_text: a continued partnership with the NYPD to increase presence along the system

evidence_refs.source_quote: a continued partnership with the NYPD to increase presence along the system
NYPD Summons & Arrests

tool_args.label: Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign
tool_args.raw_text: We successfully launched the Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign. This represented years of hard work, to enhance the Bronx network and improve customer experience for so many riders who need it the most.

payload.description: Local bus network redesign launched June 26, 2022; improves commutes by simplifying routes, balancing bus stops to improve speeds, increasing off-peak service and enhancing connectivity to the subway system and other bus routes.

evidence_refs.source_quote: We successfully launched the Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign.

The Bronx Local Bus Network Redesign improves commutes by simplifying routes, balancing bus stops to improve speeds, increasing off-peak service and enhancing connectivity to the subway system and other bus routes.

tool_args.label: Archer Av J/Z Track Reconstruction
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA reconstructing direct fixation track on the Archer Av J/Z line this summer. This work requires suspending all J/Z service past 121 St and providing alternative service.

payload.project_name: Archer Av J/Z Track Reconstruction Project
payload.description: Reconstructing 12,500 feet (2.4 miles) of direct fixation track between 121 St and Jamaica Center on the J and Z Lines. Work period July 1 through September 2022. Includes replacing third rail.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The MTA reconstructing direct fixation track on the Archer Av J/Z line this summer.
The 12,500 feet (2.4 miles) of track between 121 St and Jamaica Center on the J and Z Lines is 40 years old and at the end of its useful life.
Archer Av J/Z Track Reconstruction Project July 1 through September 2022

tool_args.label: ABLE (Automated Bus Lane Enforcement) Expansion
tool_args.raw_text: this month we awarded a contract for 300 on-bus Automated Bus Lane Enforcement camera systems to Hayden AI. This will expand our ABLE program from the current 123 buses in Brooklyn and Manhattan to 473 buses covering all boroughs the end of this year

payload.description: Contract awarded for 300 on-bus ABLE camera systems to Hayden AI; expanding from 123 buses in Brooklyn and Manhattan to 473 buses covering all boroughs by end of 2022. Current projections to install ABLE on an additional 600 buses by end of 2023.

evidence_refs.source_quote: this month we awarded a contract for 300 on-bus Automated Bus Lane Enforcement camera systems to Hayden AI. This will expand our ABLE program from the current 123 buses in Brooklyn and Manhattan to 473 buses covering all boroughs the end of this year
Current projections are to install ABLE on an additional 600 buses by the end of 2023.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

tool_args.label: OMNY Fare Payment System
tool_args.raw_text: In June, there were 37 million OMNY taps, representing 32% of NYCT's fare revenue, nearly doubling since last year.

payload.description: Contactless fare payment system. In June 2022, 37 million OMNY taps representing 32% of NYCT fare revenue. OMNY has processed transactions from bank cards issued in 179 countries. Introduction of 'Best Fare' weekly fare capping in March 2022.

evidence_refs.source_quote: In June, there were 37 million OMNY taps, representing 32% of NYCT's fare revenue, nearly doubling since last year.
OMNY has processed transactions from bank cards issued in 179 countries out of the world's 195 countries.
The introduction of 'Best Fare' weekly fare capping in March is just one example of the exciting benefits that OMNY brings to the customer experience.

issues: evidence_refs[2].source_quote is not present in the cited block

tool_args.label: Zero-Emission Bus Fleet Transition
tool_args.raw_text: as part of the journey to transition to a zero-emission bus fleet by 2040, we are bringing you a transparent view of the transition with a dedicated MTA webpage

payload.description: Transition to zero-emission bus fleet by 2040. Includes upskilling workforce, transforming operational readiness for electric propulsion, upgrading and refurbishing facilities. FTA low-no grant application submitted May 2022 supporting purchase of 470 zero-emission buses. Board action on purchase of five all-electric buses.

evidence_refs.source_quote: transition to a zero-emission bus fleet by 2040
This month the Board will take an action on the purchase of five all-electric buses

tool_args.label: ABLE (Automated Bus Lane Enforcement) Expansion
tool_args.raw_text: this month we awarded a contract for 300 on-bus Automated Bus Lane Enforcement camera systems to Hayden AI. This will expand our ABLE program from the current 123 buses in Brooklyn and Manhattan to 473 buses covering all boroughs the end of this year

payload.description: Contract awarded for 300 on-bus ABLE camera systems to Hayden AI; expanding from 123 buses in Brooklyn and Manhattan to 473 buses covering all boroughs by end of 2022. Current projections to install ABLE on an additional 600 buses by end of 2023.

evidence_refs.source_quote: As another part of our focus on improving bus trip times, this month we awarded a contract for 300 on-bus Automated Bus Lane Enforcement camera systems to Hayden AI.
Current projections are to install ABLE on an additional 600 buses by the end of 2023.

tool_args.label: Top subway customer concerns June 2022
tool_args.raw_text: June's customer pulse survey clearly tells us that personal safety and security, homeless people, and people behaving erratically are top of mind for our subway customers.

payload.claim_text: Personal safety and security, homeless people, and people behaving erratically are top of mind for our subway customers. Bus customers report greater need for improvement of wait times, crowding, and travel times and bus speeds.

evidence_refs.source_quote: personal safety and security, homeless people, and people behaving erratically are top of mind for our subway customers. In contrast, our bus customers report greater need for improvement of wait times, crowding, and travel times and bus speeds.

tool_args.label: Safety perception survey June 2022
tool_args.raw_text: The June survey indicated nearly 55% of riders feel there are too few police present in the system.

payload.claim_text: Nearly 55% of riders feel there are too few police present in the system; 50% of customers said 'too few police' when asked about uniformed police presence in the subway.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The June survey indicated nearly 55% of riders feel there are too few police present in the system.
Too few police 50%
